title: senecio transmarinus
intro: Senecio transmarinus, also known as Jacob's ladder or Jacob's staff, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio transmarinus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an antispasmodic. Senecio transmarinus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although its use should be cautious due to potential toxicity.
